headline: D.R. Horton, Inc. to Release 2026 Third Quarter Earnings on July 21, 2026
summary: ARLINGTON, Texas, May 19, 2026--D.R. Horton announced that the Company will release financial results for its third quarter ended June 30, 2026 on Tuesday, July 21, 2026.

headline: ValuEngine Weekly Market Summary And Commentary
summary: US equity markets were mixed this week, with broader ETF performance showing limited movement across the major benchmarks and sectors. Sector performance was uneven. Read more here.
